About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in AXTI, which ranks #1 with a composite score of 98.6—driven by a staggering 8,422% one-year return and exceptional consistency across all timeframes (4 of 4 ratio passes, all SMA gates cleared). AXTI's 15.69% single-day gain combined with its 307% three-month return and 1,122% six-month return suggest an extreme momentum event, though the very sharp acceleration in longer timeframes (ratio_1y_3m of 27.37) warrants caution about sustainability. In contrast, MXL shows more moderate but still strong performance with a 725% one-year return and a 98.6 baseline momentum signal, with better-balanced ratio progression (no single explosive jump), suggesting potentially more sustainable gains. Both securities pass all SMA filters and significantly outpace SPY and QQQ across measured periods, but AXTI's explosive growth profile stands out as genuinely exceptional rather than typical market-leading momentum.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
